title: Beehiiv vs MailerLite (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and MailerLite. See pricing, features, and ratings to find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs MailerLite: A Complete Comparison
intro: Beehiiv and MailerLite are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators and monetization, while MailerLite emphasizes simplicity for small businesses. This comparison will help you choose the right tool based on your specific needs and budget.
choose_a_if: You want to monetize your newsletter through ads or sponsorships
You're a content creator focused on growing subscriber revenue
You need advanced segmentation and analytics for publisher operations
choose_b_if: You're starting out and need an affordable, beginner-friendly platform
You want drag-and-drop landing pages, pop-ups, and surveys
You run an e-commerce business and need native integrations

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter monetization and media operations, while MailerLite wins on affordability, ease of use, and e-commerce features. Choose based on whether you prioritize newsletter revenue or general email marketing simplicity.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or MailerLite?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. Both offer free tiers, though Beehiiv allows up to 2,500 free subscribers versus MailerLite's 1,000. For budget-conscious businesses, MailerLite offers better value.

faq.q: Can I switch from MailerLite to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support subscriber list imports via CSV or API integrations. Most email providers allow data export, making migration straightforward. However, you may need to recreate automation workflows and templates on the new platform, so plan accordingly.
